_comment: Operators that get (re-)seeded onto MoveChain after every fresh deploy. A redeploy creates a new MoveChain address and wipes the on-chain operator whitelist, so this list is the source of truth. Seeding is idempotent: operators already whitelisted on-chain are skipped. `price` is the trip price in TripCredits (uint256, as a string). Replace the placeholders below with the real operators, or leave the list empty to skip seeding.
